tài</Caption><DataMember>SoTai</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><Key>SoMaCan</Key><Position>0</Position></Column0><Column1 ID="NgayGioCan"><Caption>Ngày cân</Caption><DataMember>NgayGioCan</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><Key>NgayGioCan</Key><Position>1</Position></Column1><Column2 ID="TrongLuongMiaSach"><AggregateFunction>Sum</AggregateFunction><Caption>Trọng lượng mía</Caption><DataMember>TrongLuongMiaSach</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString>###,###</FormatString><Key>TrongLuongMiaSach</Key><Position>2</Position><Visible>False</Visible><Width>120</Width></Column2><Column3 ID="TapChat"><Caption>%Tạp chất</Caption><DataMember>TyLeTapVat</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><Key>TapChat</Key><Position>3</Position><Visible>False</Visible><Width>119</Width></Column3><Column4 ID="ThanhTien"><AggregateFunction>Sum</AggregateFunction><Caption>Thành hộ</Caption><ColumnType>CheckBox</ColumnType><DataMember>HopDongID</DataMember><EditType>CheckBox</EditType><Key>HopDongID</Key><Position>7</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column7><Column8 ID="ConLai"><AggregateFunction>Sum</AggregateFunction><Caption>Còn
